---
title: "fmnhtiger_size"
author: "EGP"
date: "2025-04-16"
output:
  html_document: default
  pdf_document: default
---

```{r}
rm(list=ls())
graphics.off()
```
# Read-In Data
```{r}
full_data<-read.csv("spec_expanded.csv")
handmeasures<-read.csv("handmeasure.csv")

# Make sure size is numeric

full_data$spec_area_mm2 <- full_data$spec_area_mm2 %>%
  na_if("NONE") %>%
  na_if("MISSING") %>%
  na_if("") %>%
  as.numeric()

full_data$len1_mm <- full_data$len1_mm %>%
  na_if("NONE") %>%
  na_if("MISSING") %>%
  na_if("") %>%
  as.numeric()

full_data$len2_mm <- full_data$len2_mm %>%
  na_if("NONE") %>%
  na_if("MISSING") %>%
  na_if("") %>%
  as.numeric()
```
# Install Packages
```{r}
library("dplyr")
library("ggplot2")
library("tidyverse")
library("gridExtra")
```
# Organize Data
## Get full_ids for hand-measured specimens
```{r}
# match barcode to tray_id
barcode_tray <- full_data %>%
  distinct(unit_barcode, tray_id)

# merge with handmeasures
handmeasures <- merge(handmeasures, barcode_tray, 
                      by = "unit_barcode", all.x = TRUE)

# add spec number
handmeasures$full_id <- paste0(handmeasures$tray_id, "_spec_", 
                               sprintf("%03d", handmeasures$spec_position))
```
## Create df with manual + digital measurements
```{r}
full_data <- left_join(full_data, 
                       handmeasures[, c("full_id", "manual_length_mm", "manual_width_mm")],
                       by = "full_id")
```
# Plots
## Create Digital vs Manual df
```{r}
# rename to indicate digital measurements
full_data <- full_data %>%
  rename(digital_length_mm = len1_mm,
         digital_width_mm = len2_mm)

# only look at specimens w/ digital & manual
comparison <- full_data %>%
  filter(!is.na(manual_length_mm) & !is.na(digital_length_mm) &
         !is.na(manual_width_mm) & !is.na(digital_width_mm))
```
### LENGTH Digital vs Manual
```{r}
# calculate regression info

length_lm <- lm(digital_length_mm ~ manual_length_mm, data = comparison)
length_r2 <- round(summary(length_lm)$r.squared, 3)
length_eq <- paste0("R² = ", length_r2)

# make simple plot

length_compare<-ggplot(comparison, aes(x = manual_length_mm, y = digital_length_mm)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.8, color = "black", fill = "red", shape = 21, size = 2) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = TRUE, color = "black") +
  labs(x = "Manual Length (mm)",
       y = "Digital Length (mm)") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(axis.title.x = element_text(margin = margin(t = 15)),
        axis.title.y = element_text(margin = margin(r = 15))) +
  annotate("text", x = 15, y = 25, label = length_eq) +
  scale_x_continuous(limits = c(5, 40), breaks = seq(5, 40, by = 10), minor_breaks = NULL) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(5, 40), breaks = seq(5, 40, by = 10), minor_breaks = NULL)
```
### WIDTH Digital vs Manual
```{r}
# calculate regression info

width_lm <- lm(digital_width_mm ~ manual_width_mm, data = comparison)
width_r2 <- round(summary(width_lm)$r.squared, 3)
width_eq <- paste0("R² = ", width_r2)

# make simple plot

width_compare<-ggplot(comparison, aes(x = manual_width_mm, y = digital_width_mm)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.8, color = "black", fill = "blue", shape = 21, size = 2) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = TRUE, color = "black") +
  labs(x = "Manual Width (mm)",
       y = "Digital Width (mm)") +
  annotate("text", x = 4, y = 8, label = width_eq) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(axis.title.x = element_text(margin = margin(t = 15)),
        axis.title.y = element_text(margin = margin(r = 15))) +
  scale_x_continuous(limits = c(0, 12), breaks = seq(0, 12, by = 2), minor_breaks = NULL) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 12), breaks = seq(0, 12, by = 2), minor_breaks = NULL)

```
### Combined Plot
```{r}
grid.arrange(length_compare, width_compare, ncol=2)
```
## Length by Genera
```{r}
# Calculate means and standard errors by genus
genus_stats <- full_data %>%
  filter(!is.na(genus) & genus != "") %>%  # Remove NA and blank genus names
  group_by(genus) %>%
  summarise(
    avg_length = mean(digital_length_mm, na.rm = TRUE),
    se_length = sd(digital_length_mm, na.rm = TRUE) / sqrt(sum(!is.na(digital_length_mm))),
    avg_width = mean(digital_width_mm, na.rm = TRUE),
    se_width = sd(digital_width_mm, na.rm = TRUE) / sqrt(sum(!is.na(digital_width_mm))),
    avg_area = mean(spec_area_mm2, na.rm = TRUE),
    se_area = sd(spec_area_mm2, na.rm = TRUE) / sqrt(sum(!is.na(spec_area_mm2))),
    n_specimens = sum(!is.na(digital_length_mm)),  # Count specimens per genus
    .groups = 'drop'
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(avg_length) & !is.na(avg_width) & !is.na(avg_area))
```
### Avg Lenth Plot
```{r}
genus_lengths <- genus_stats %>%
  arrange(desc(avg_length)) %>%
  mutate(genus = factor(genus, levels = genus)) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = genus, y = avg_length)) +
  geom_point(size = 2) +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = avg_length - se_length, ymax = avg_length + se_length),
                width = 0.2) +
  labs(x = "Genus",
       y = "Average Length (mm)") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90, hjust = 1, vjust = 0.5, size = 9),
        axis.ticks = element_blank(),
        panel.grid = element_blank(), axis.line = element_line(color = "gray")) +
  theme(axis.title.x = element_text(margin = margin(t = 15)),
        axis.title.y = element_text(margin = margin(r = 15)))

plot(genus_lengths)
```

```{r}
length_compare <- ggplot(comparison, aes(x = manual_length_mm, y = digital_length_mm)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.8, color = "black", fill = "red", shape = 21, size = 2) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = TRUE, color = "black") +
  labs(x = "Manual Length (mm)",
       y = "Digital Length (mm)") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
  theme(axis.title.x = element_text(margin = margin(t = 15), size = 12),
        axis.title.y = element_text(margin = margin(r = 15), size = 12),
        axis.text = element_text(size = 11),
        axis.ticks = element_blank(),
        axis.line = element_line(color = "gray")) +
  annotate("text", x = 15, y = 25, label = length_eq, size = 4) +
  scale_x_continuous(limits = c(5, 40), breaks = seq(5, 40, by = 10), minor_breaks = NULL) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(5, 40), breaks = seq(5, 40, by = 10), minor_breaks = NULL)

width_compare <- ggplot(comparison, aes(x = manual_width_mm, y = digital_width_mm)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.8, color = "black", fill = "blue", shape = 21, size = 2) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = TRUE, color = "black") +
  labs(x = "Manual Width (mm)",
       y = "Digital Width (mm)") +
  annotate("text", x = 4, y = 8, label = width_eq, size = 4) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
  theme(axis.title.x = element_text(margin = margin(t = 15), size = 12),
        axis.title.y = element_text(margin = margin(r = 15), size = 12),
        axis.text = element_text(size = 11),
        axis.ticks = element_blank(),
        axis.line = element_line(color = "gray")) +
  scale_x_continuous(limits = c(0, 12), breaks = seq(0, 12, by = 2), minor_breaks = NULL) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 12), breaks = seq(0, 12, by = 2), minor_breaks = NULL)

genus_lengths <- genus_stats %>%
  arrange(desc(avg_length)) %>%
  mutate(genus = factor(genus, levels = genus)) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = genus, y = avg_length)) +
  geom_point(size = 2) +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = avg_length - se_length, ymax = avg_length + se_length),
                width = 0.2) +
  labs(x = "Genus",
       y = "Average Length (mm)") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90, hjust = 1, vjust = 0.5, size = 10),
        axis.text.y = element_text(size = 11),
        axis.ticks = element_blank(),
        panel.grid = element_blank(), 
        axis.line = element_line(color = "gray"),
        axis.title.x = element_text(margin = margin(t = 15), size = 12),
        axis.title.y = element_text(margin = margin(r = 15), size = 12))

# Create the layout
combined_plot <- grid.arrange(
  length_compare, width_compare, genus_lengths,
  layout_matrix = rbind(c(1, 2),
                       c(3, 3)),
  heights = c(1, 1.2)
)
print(combined_plot)
```
